An NWS Survey Team found damage consistent with a weak tornado near the Kings Grant subdivision in Wilmington, NC and along Cornelius Moor Avenue and Acorn Branch Road in Wilmington, NC. Damage included large downed tree limbs, a couple of snapped/uprooted trees, and minor shingle damage. A Public Information Statement has been issued.
